creator: jrs@tds-net.net
text:
Updating the ports collection via cvsup to my local machine, cvsup10.us.FreeBSD.org does not have the latest updates.

Switching to a different mirror resolved the problem.

Fix: 

Use a different cvsup server, e.g. cvsup9.us.FreeBSD.org.
How-To-Repeat: Point your cvsup server to cvsup10.us.FreeBSD.org.
